data.title: Feast Day Celebration of St. Vincent Ferrer
data.description: Annual Parish Fiesta in honor of our patron St. Vincent Ferrer, featuring solemn pontifical mass, procession, and community festivities.

data.title: Flores de Mayo Devotion & Rosary
data.description: Daily praying of the Holy Rosary and flower offering by parish children throughout the month of May.

data.title: Parish Youth Conference 2026
data.description: Gathering of parish youth for spiritual renewal, leadership workshops, praise & worship, and fellowship.

data.title: BEC Anniversary Celebration
data.description: Community service, Thanksgiving Mass, and fellowship with all Basic Ecclesial Communities.

data.title: All Saints Day & Blessing of Graves
data.description: Solemn Masses and blessing of graves in commemoration of all saints and departed loved ones.

data.title: Misa de Gallo (Simbang Gabi)
data.description: Traditional nine-day dawn Masses preparing our hearts for the birth of our Lord Jesus Christ.
